title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for brownstones and historic buildings. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Prospect Heights homeowners facing bat infestations need swift, professional intervention to protect their properties and families. Our expert bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies from attics, chimneys, and wall voids while ensuring they cannot return. We specialize in humane bat control methods that comply with all New York wildlife protection regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Prospect Heights' unique architectural landscape, from classic brownstones to modern condos. Our certified technicians use proven exclusion techniques and offer comprehensive warranties, ensuring your bat problem is solved permanently the first time.
localContext: Prospect Heights' beautiful tree-lined streets and historic brownstones near Prospect Park and the Brooklyn Botanic Garden create ideal conditions for bat roosting, especially in older buildings with accessible eaves and attics. The neighborhood's mix of 19th-century architecture and proximity to green spaces means bats frequently seek shelter in residential chimneys, roof spaces, and behind decorative cornices.

faqs.question: What does the bat removal process involve in Prospect Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Our bat removal process begins with a thorough inspection to identify entry points and roosting areas. We then install one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit but prevent re-entry, followed by sealing all potential access points. Finally, we clean and decontaminate affected areas and provide monitoring to ensure complete exclusion.

faqs.question: Why does bat removal cost between $900 and $2,500?
faqs.answer: The cost varies based on colony size, number of entry points, building height, and extent of exclusion work needed. Smaller jobs on accessible single-family homes start around $900, while larger infestations in multi-story brownstones requiring extensive sealing and cleanup can reach $2,500. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: When is bat season in Prospect Heights, and when should exclusion be done?
faqs.answer: Bats are most active in Prospect Heights from April through October. However, exclusion work cannot be performed during maternity season (June through mid-August) when flightless baby bats are present. The ideal times for bat exclusion are early spring (April-May) or late summer through fall (late August-October).

faqs.question: Are bats dangerous, and do they damage Prospect Heights homes?
faqs.answer: While bats rarely attack humans, their droppings (guano) can cause serious health risks including histoplasmosis, and their urine can stain ceilings and create foul odors. Bats can also damage insulation, attract parasites, and their accumulation of waste can compromise structural integrity over time. Professional removal and cleanup is essential for health and property protection.
